reference: Hello. I have been experiencing stomach pain for about seven months now. In the beginning, I was constipated for about three weeks and finally had black, tarry stool. That is gone; however, I still have severe abdominal pain. I had an endoscopy today, but everything came back negative. The doctor suggested another endoscopy. What should I do? The pain is becoming unbearable, but everything is indicating that it is simply in my head.
text: Hello, I have been experiencing stomach pain for about 7 months now. In the beginning, I was constipated for about 3 weeks and finally had black tarry stool. That has gone. However, I still have severe abdominal pain. I had an endoscopy today, but everything came back negative. The doctor suggested another endoscopy. What should I do? The pain is becoming unbearable, but everything is indicating that it is simply in my head.
